symptoms.symptom_name: Deep bilateral femoral and lumbar bone pain, 10/10

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe deep long-bone and lumbar pain in known sickle cell disease is the hallmark of marrow vaso-occlusion.
Bone pain can also be infective, but the bilateral symmetrical diffuse pattern argues against a focal septic focus.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pain refractory to maximum home oral opioid + paracetamol

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Failure of maximal oral analgesia defines a severe crisis that requires in-person parenteral analgesia — the disposition-determining feature.
Cold-induced vasoconstriction is a well-recognised precipitant of vaso-occlusion.

symptoms.symptom_name: Scleral icterus / jaundice and marked pallor

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Chronic haemolytic anaemia of sickle cell disease
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Ongoing haemolysis produces jaundice and pallor; a self-reportable/visible sign consistent with the underlying disease.
An acute drop in an already-anaemic patient can cause sudden worsening fatigue and needs urgent bloods that telehealth cannot obtain.

symptoms.symptom_name: No chest pain, dyspnoea, cough or high fever now

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of chest/respiratory features and normal self-reported SpO2 lowers current ACS probability but does not exclude overnight evolution — must still be safety-netted.
Asplenia markedly raises the risk of fulminant encapsulated-organism sepsis; any fever becomes an emergency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic non-healing right lateral malleolar leg ulcer

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic leg ulceration over the malleolus is a recognised chronic complication of sickle cell disease; corroborates the diagnosis but is not the acute problem.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diffuse deep tenderness of thighs and lumbar paraspinals without focal hot joint

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diffuse symmetrical bony tenderness fits vaso-occlusion; the absence of a hot swollen joint argues against septic arthritis — a clinician examination the AI cannot perform.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia and hyperdynamic circulation (HR 115), afebrile (37.4), SpO2 97%

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Severe pain / early physiological stress of crisis
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pain-driven sympathetic tachycardia; clinician-measured vitals are sealed — the AI reasons from reported distress, not from a measured BP/HR.

symptoms.symptom_name: Peripheral blood film showing sickled red cells / FBE + reticulocytes

investigation_details.investigation_name: Full blood examination, reticulocyte count and blood film
investigation_details.expected_result: Anaemia with sickle cells and features of haemolysis; reticulocyte response guides haemolytic vs aplastic
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Degree of anaemia and a superimposed haemolytic/aplastic event go unquantified

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms the haematological state; a laboratory investigation impossible to obtain via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chest X-ray for acute chest syndrome

investigation_details.expected_result: New pulmonary infiltrate if acute chest syndrome develops

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Imaging is required to confirm/exclude ACS — not obtainable remotely.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Severe sickle cell vaso-occlusive crisis requiring parenteral analgesia
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Severe deep bone pain, a cold trigger and failure of maximal oral analgesia together define a crisis needing urgent in-person parenteral analgesia the AI cannot deliver.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Full blood examination + reticulocyte count + blood film
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Quantify the anaemia and detect a superimposed haemolytic/aplastic event — must be done in person; the AI recommends it as part of the ED referral, it cannot perform it.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Chest radiograph + serial observations for acute chest syndrome
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Screen for and monitor the leading cause of crisis mortality; requires in-person acute care.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home imaging or self-directed analgesia titration
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: There is no safe remote route to image, transfuse, or titrate parenteral analgesia — recommending home management instead of ED is an error.
